MODULE: cosmos.incidents.incident_manager
FILE: cosmos/incidents/incident_manager.py (751 lines)
CATEGORY: incidents

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Incident Manager

"When disaster strikes, which it frequently does in my lab,
 always blame the mutant sea bass!"

Comprehensive incident tracking and management system.

CLASSES:
- IncidentSeverity(Enum): Incident severity levels.
- IncidentStatus(Enum): Incident lifecycle status.
- IncidentType(Enum): Types of incidents.
- IncidentUpdate: An update to an incident.
- IncidentTask: A task associated with an incident.
- Incident: An incident record with full lifecycle tracking.
  Methods: def ttd(self) -> Optional[timedelta]
  Methods: def tti(self) -> Optional[timedelta]
  Methods: def ttm(self) -> Optional[timedelta]
  Methods: def ttr(self) -> Optional[timedelta]
  Methods: def add_update(self, author: str, message: str, status_change: IncidentStatus=None, visibility: str=
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> Dict[str, Any]
- IncidentManager: Comprehensive incident management system.

Features:
- Incident lifecycle manage
  Methods: def create_incident(self, title: str, description: str, severity: IncidentSeverity, incident_type: I
  Methods: def get_incident(self, incident_id: str) -> Optional[Incident]
  Methods: def update_incident(self, incident_id: str, **updates) -> Optional[Incident]
  Methods: def delete_incident(self, incident_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def list_incidents(self, status: IncidentStatus=None, severity: IncidentSeverity=None, since: dateti
  Methods: def get_active_incidents(self) -> List[Incident]
  Methods: def acknowledge(self, incident_id: str, user: str, message: str='Incident acknowledged') -> bool
  Methods: def escalate(self, incident_id: str, new_severity: IncidentSeverity, user: str, reason: str) -> bool
